title: ObjectLinkingSettings (Beta) - Metadata API
description: Represents the channel-object linking settings for an org. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableObjectLinking.description: Indicates whether Channel-Object Linking is enabled, allowing you to link channel interactions to objects such as Contacts. The default value is false.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of an ObjectLinkingSettings component.
